HGSS.598.0000:
Pokémon get more friendly if you
spend time with them.
HGSS.598.0001:
They can shine like a bright light--
like a beacon at night to guide us...\f
They can take us across the water on
their backs when we are without\r
a boat...\f
Pokémon are helping us everywhere.\r
I can’t imagine a life without them!
HGSS.598.0002:
There’s a person in Cianwood City
across the sea.\f
I heard him bragging about his
rare Pokémon.
HGSS.598.0003:
...There!
All done!\r
It’s sure to surprise anyone!\f
HGSS.598.0004:
Oh, are you a Trainer?\f
You came at just the right time!
I just finished putting my Ball Capsule\r
on my Poké Ball.\f
Do you want to battle and be
amazed by my decoration? [0200,0000]
HGSS.598.0006:
You can turn your Poké Balls into your
own special creations by adding Seals.\f
How cool is it to have a Poké Ball that
only you have in the entire world?\r
Give it a whirl!\f
Oh, remember to put the Ball Capsule
on a Poké Ball once it’s ready!
HGSS.598.0007:
Oh, really?\f
Talk to me if you want to see my
Ball Capsule sometime!
HGSS.598.0008:
Now you want to see my Ball Capsule?\f
Battle me so I can show it to you! [0200,0000]
